ToolResultContent.description: The result of a tool use, provided by the user back to the assistant.

toolUseId.description: The ID of the tool use this result corresponds to.

input.description: The arguments to pass to the tool.

name.description: Intended for programmatic or logical use, but used as a display name in past specs or fallback (if title is not present).
